BRAZIL-SOUTH COAST.
1. SEIMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS UNTIL 210259Z APR BY
   M/V NPS WG COOK TOWING 12 FIVE MILE LONG CABLES
   IN AREA BOUND BY
   25-42S 044-02W, 25-06S 043-37W,
   26-03S 041-57W, 26-39S 042-22W.
   SIX MILE BERTH REQUESTED.
2. CANCEL HYDROLANT 759/12.
3. CANCEL THIS MSG 210359Z APR.
